title: Pabellon Criollo Beef Stew
description: A classic Venezuelan beef stew made with tender beef and crispy plantains. This hearty dish is perfect for a cold evening.
instructions: Heat oil in a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
Add beef and cook until browned, about 5 minutes. Remove from pot and set aside.
Add onion and cook until softened, about 3 minutes.
Add garlic and cook for 1 minute.
Add chili peppers and cook for 1 minute.
Add cumin, coriander, salt, and pepper. Cook for 1 minute.
Add beef back into the pot and pour in beef broth.
Bring to a boil, then cover and transfer to the oven.
Bake at 300°F for 1 1/2 hours, or until beef is tender.
About 30 minutes before serving, add sliced plantains to the pot.
Continue cooking until plantains are crispy and golden brown.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh cilantro if desired.
